_comment: Nano Banana Pro × PPTX — Example Slide Config (Midnight Editorial / Style A)
title: The Future of Sustainable Design
author: Your Name / Organization
_global_vars_note: These values are available as {{TOKEN}} in every slide prompt.

variables.STYLE_A_SYSTEM:
Design language — Midnight Editorial:
Background fill: near-black #0B0F19. Card/panel surface: #131929.
All text: off-white #F0F4FF. Single accent color: electric blue #3B82F6.
Muted labels: slate #64748B.
Typography: heavy condensed sans-serif titles (bold, tight tracking), light-weight body.
Section category labels in ALL CAPS small text, electric blue.
ONE thin 2px electric-blue horizontal rule spans the full width at the very top of the slide.
NO gradients, NO blob shapes, NO decorative ornaments beyond the top rule.
Negative space is intentional — breathe.

slides.name: Cover
slides._note: Slide-level variables override global ones. Prompts can use any {{TOKEN}}.
slides.prompt:
{{STYLE_A_SYSTEM}}
COVER SLIDE. Centered composition with massive negative space.
Top-left: category label in electric blue ALL CAPS: "{{CATEGORY}}"
Center: Hero title "{{TITLE}}" — condensed bold, very large, 3 lines max, off-white.
Below title: subtitle "{{SUBTITLE}}" in light-weight, smaller, slate color.
Bottom strip: thin dark surface bar (#131929) spanning full width.
  Inside bar — left-aligned: "{{DATE}}" in slate. Right-aligned: "{{ORGANIZATION}}" in slate.
Nothing else. Massive dark open space dominates. The title breathes.
16:9 aspect ratio. 4K ultra-quality.

slides.name: Agenda

variables.AGENDA_ITEMS:
01   The Sustainability Imperative
     Why design can no longer ignore its footprint
02   Material Intelligence
     Smart choices at the sourcing stage
03   Circular Systems
     Designing products for their second life
04   Measurement & Reporting
     What good looks like in numbers

slides.prompt:
{{STYLE_A_SYSTEM}}
AGENDA SLIDE.
Maintain identical visual DNA as the reference image.
Top-left: category label "AGENDA" in electric blue ALL CAPS.
Below: agenda items as a clean numbered list:
{{AGENDA_ITEMS}}
  (Large electric-blue numeral per item, item title in off-white, descriptor in slate below.)
Full-width dark surface card #131929 behind the list. Generous row height.
Bottom-right: slide counter "{{PAGE}} / {{TOTAL}}" in slate small text.
16:9. 4K.

slides.name: Left Text / Right Image — Material Intelligence

variables.BULLETS:
— Renewable inputs now cost-competitive with virgin materials
— Bio-based composites outperform plastics in 6 of 9 durability metrics
— Supplier certification is the new table stakes for procurement
— Regional sourcing reduces embodied carbon by up to 40%
variables.IMAGE_DESCRIPTION: Close-up macro photograph of woven natural fibers — linen, cork, and bamboo — beautifully lit with warm side-lighting, editorial product photography style, neutral background, premium texture detail

slides.prompt:
{{STYLE_A_SYSTEM}}
SPLIT LAYOUT — LEFT TEXT / RIGHT IMAGE.
Maintain identical visual DNA as the reference image.
Left half (48% width): dark surface panel #131929.
  Top of panel: section category label "{{SECTION}}" in electric blue ALL CAPS, small.
  Below: slide title "{{SLIDE_TITLE}}" in condensed bold, large, off-white, 2 lines max.
  Below title: {{BULLET_COUNT}} bullet points, each prefixed with a thin blue dash "—":
{{BULLETS}}
  Bottom of panel: page counter "{{PAGE}} / {{TOTAL}}" in slate.
Right half (52% width): AI-generated full-bleed image.
  Image subject: "{{IMAGE_DESCRIPTION}}"
  Image mood: editorial, professional, slightly desaturated to harmonize with dark palette.
  Vertical divider between panels: 1px electric blue line.
16:9. 4K.

slides.name: Left Image / Right Text — Circular Systems

variables.IMAGE_DESCRIPTION: Aerial view of a beautifully organized material recovery facility — clean, modern, almost gallery-like, with sorted colored materials in separate zones, dramatic overhead lighting, architectural photography style
variables.BODY_TEXT:
— Design for disassembly must be a brief requirement, not an afterthought
— Modular systems extend product lifespan by an average of 7 years
— Reverse logistics partnerships are now available at SME scale
— Circularity indexes are entering client RFPs across Europe and APAC
variables.SOURCE: Ellen MacArthur Foundation, 2024 Circular Economy Report

slides.prompt:
{{STYLE_A_SYSTEM}}
SPLIT LAYOUT — LEFT IMAGE / RIGHT TEXT.
Maintain identical visual DNA as the reference image.
Left half (52% width): AI-generated full-bleed image, fills the panel edge-to-edge.
  Image subject: "{{IMAGE_DESCRIPTION}}"
  Mood: editorial, cinematic, slightly cooler tones.
  Vertical divider on the right edge of image: 1px electric blue line.
Right half (48% width): dark surface panel #131929.
  Top: section label "{{SECTION}}" in electric blue ALL CAPS, small.
  Below: "{{SLIDE_TITLE}}" in condensed bold, large, off-white.
  Paragraph / bullets below:
{{BODY_TEXT}}
  Bottom: attribution or source note in slate italic, very small: "{{SOURCE}}"
16:9. 4K.

slides.name: Stats

variables.STATS:
67% | of consumers | willing to pay premium for verified sustainable products
$2.8T | market opportunity | in circular economy by 2030 (WEF)
43% | carbon reduction | achievable through material substitution alone
variables.FOOTNOTE: Sources: McKinsey Consumer Survey 2024 · World Economic Forum · IPCC Materials Report

slides.prompt:
{{STYLE_A_SYSTEM}}
DATA SLIDE.
Maintain identical visual DNA as the reference image.
Top: section label "BY THE NUMBERS" in electric blue ALL CAPS.
Below: slide title "{{SLIDE_TITLE}}" in condensed bold, large, off-white.
Center: {{STAT_COUNT}} stat cards in a horizontal row. Each card (#131929 background):
  Very large numeral in electric blue. Label below in off-white medium weight. Context in slate small.
Stats (STAT | LABEL | CONTEXT format):
{{STATS}}
Cards separated by 1px blue vertical rules.
Bottom: footnote in slate, small italic: "{{FOOTNOTE}}"
16:9. 4K.

slides.name: Quote

variables.QUOTE_TEXT: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it performs — and for how long.
variables.SPEAKER_TITLE: Senior Curator of Architecture & Design, MoMA

slides.prompt:
{{STYLE_A_SYSTEM}}
PULL QUOTE SLIDE.
Maintain identical visual DNA as the reference image.
Full dark background. Centered vertically and horizontally.
Giant quotation mark in electric blue, top-left, decorative, ~150pt.
Quote text — editorial italic serif — large, off-white, centered:
  "{{QUOTE_TEXT}}"
Below quote: thin 1px electric-blue horizontal rule, centered, 200px wide.
Attribution: "— {{SPEAKER_NAME}}" in condensed bold, off-white.
  "{{SPEAKER_TITLE}}" on next line, slate, light weight.
Nothing else. Maximum breathing space.
16:9. 4K.

slides.name: Closing / Thank You

variables.TAKEAWAYS:
→ Material choices made today determine carbon budgets for decades
→ Circular design is now a client requirement, not a differentiator
→ Studios that lead on sustainability will define the next decade
variables.CLOSING_SUBTITLE: Sustainable futures begin with intentional design

slides.prompt:
{{STYLE_A_SYSTEM}}
CLOSING SLIDE.
Maintain identical visual DNA as the reference image.
Left 42%: dark surface panel #131929.
  Top: "KEY TAKEAWAYS" in electric blue ALL CAPS.
  Below: {{TAKEAWAY_COUNT}} takeaway lines:
{{TAKEAWAYS}}
Right 58%: near-black background #0B0F19.
  Center: large off-white bold text "{{CLOSING_WORD}}"
  Below: "{{CLOSING_SUBTITLE}}" in slate, lighter weight.
  Bottom: "{{CONTACT_EMAIL}}  ·  {{CONTACT_WEB}}" in slate, small.
16:9. 4K.
